goal: Mac organize — git hygiene, park extra daemons, log review, confirm mobile status still works
commands: cd ~/Desktop/ogz-knowledge && git fetch origin main && git checkout main && chmod +x scripts/mac_confirm.sh && ./scripts/mac_confirm.sh

DOMAIN=gui/$(id -u); for label in com.ogz.live-feed com.ogz.live-feed-digest com.ogz.portal; do launchctl bootout $DOMAIN ~/Library/LaunchAgents/${label}.plist 2>/dev/null || launchctl unload ~/Library/LaunchAgents/${label}.plist 2>/dev/null || true; done
cd ~/Desktop/ogz-knowledge && python3 scripts/unified_status.py --plain && launchctl list | grep com.ogz
